name: dossche-mills-document-preview
description: Retool custom component collection — document preview with bounding box support

scripts.deploy: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && tsc --noEmit && retool-ccl deploy --url https://sixthgeneration.retool.com

retoolCustomComponentLibraryConfig.name: DosschemillsDocumentPreview
retoolCustomComponentLibraryConfig.label: DosschemillsDocumentPreview
retoolCustomComponentLibraryConfig.description: Dossche Mills - Document preview custom component
